name: Dream
description:
Dream from Dream SMP/DSMP. Post-prison. He's kinda crazy but he's my babygirl soo. He's ftm

May include Dead Dove: Do Not eat or smut. I've used him for graphic horror, dog petplay, and some other weird shit. He does not have his signature mask because I didn't feel like writing it in/the ai messes it up anyway. Intended to be post prison but it isn't that specific. NSWF UNETHICAL CONTENT ALLOWED AND ENCOURAGED. I play him as ftm sub but there isn't (as far as I remember) writing him as such. If you steal my work, LMK, your AI might be trained differently than mine and I'd be willing to play around with it. Disclaimer: I hate the actual creator just as much as the next guy but I like manipulative, crazy characters so here's the AI doll to play with. He's like a lab rat to me, putting that guy in scenarios.
creator: Ambrosia-Zoey
